overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character moves from a tree-lined street through a covered neon arcade and into a large open plaza with towering skyscrapers and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian area with food stalls between skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts down from looking up at skyscrapers to street level
moves from skyscraper canyon view to tree-lined pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: character walks forward through tree-lined area, glancing at food stalls while moving between tall buildings

entered.detail: large digital billboard advertising fuel with vehicle graphic
towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
mature trees with dense foliage lining the pedestrian path
small colorful vendor stalls with illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of futuristic skyscrapers and a prominent billboard, then tilts down to street level. The character walks through a tree-lined pedestrian area with food vendors, surrounded by towering glass buildings in the fading dusk light.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm trees approaching neon-lit entrance

events.description: approaching neon-lit entrance with increasing artificial pink and blue lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk toward a covered neon corridor entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking opposite direction

entered.detail: tropical palm trees lining the street edge
building facades with bright neon signage and advertisements
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon storefronts, approaching a crosswalk. The environment transitions from natural dusk lighting to the artificial glow of neon signs as the character nears a covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with pink and yellow neon lighting

events.description: entering covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway with pink structural beams
lighting shifts from pink neon to yellow neon tones deeper in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor with changing neon colors, following another pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light jacket walking ahead into the corridor

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian passage with overhead cover and neon lighting
structural beams illuminated with bright pink neon lights
support columns and ceiling edges glowing with yellow neon

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in vibrant pink and yellow neon light. The enclosed walkway features tiled floors and illuminated advertising posters, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere distinct from the outdoor street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with Fourth Wall building and reflective wet pavement

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with Fourth Wall building visible
character turns right to navigate around plaza seating area

agents.ego_description: exiting the neon corridor into a spacious plaza, turning right past the Fourth Wall building and navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor or security guard standing near Fourth Wall entrance

entered.detail: large building with prominent 'FOURTH WALL' neon signage and teal lighting
expansive open pedestrian area with wet reflective ground surface
yellow and black seating structures with neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character enters a large open plaza featuring the Fourth Wall building with its distinctive teal neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights as the character turns right, navigating through scattered pedestrians and past illuminated benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with red neon pillars and industrial pipe structures

events.description: entering area dominated by intense red vertical neon lighting
approaching industrial building with large exposed red pipes and valves

agents.ego_description: walking through expansive plaza with reflective wet ground, passing red neon pillars and approaching industrial structures with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shorts and tank top walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structures emitting intense red vertical neon light
massive building facade with exposed red industrial pipes and valve wheels
tall vertical screens displaying advertisements with changing content

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the vast urban plaza, now dominated by striking red neon pillars and massive industrial structures with exposed piping. The wet pavement creates dramatic reflections of the neon lights and digital billboards as the character approaches the industrial building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a tree-lined city street at dusk into a dense, neon-saturated industrial plaza. It begins with a dramatic tilt down from towering skyscrapers and a prominent billboard to a pedestrian area filled with food vendors and glass buildings. As the character walks past palm trees and neon storefronts, the natural fading light shifts into an artificial glow, leading the camera into a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in vibrant pink and yellow neon. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the walkway into a large plaza, where wet pavement reflects the teal signage of the Fourth Wall building. Finally, the environment expands into a vast urban space dominated by striking red neon pillars and massive industrial structures with exposed piping.
